input: user-item interaction graph and knowledge graph
backbone: multi-task learning with attention-based user aggregation and relation-aware GCN
loss: recommendation loss (e.g., cross-entropy) + KGE loss (e.g., scoring function)
key_idea: enhance MKR by attention-based user historical behavior aggregation and relation-aware GCN for multi-relation KG embeddings, plus a two-part user modeling strategy for sparsity adaptation
